title: Amitai Finlayson’s Resume
text:
Aspiring Software Engineer, Analytical Problem Solver.

Project: AI Chatbot for Canvas | Portfolio



Sophomore at Brigham Young University - Idaho, studying Computer Science.


Python, JavaScript, C#, HTML/CSS; Advanced MySQL (CTEs, Window Functions, ERD); RESTful APIs, Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).



Artificial Intelligence, Natural Language Processing, Full-stack Web Development, Database Architecture, Educational Technology.




Jan 2023 - present Brigham Young University - Idaho

Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
Expected Graduation: Fall 2026




Feb 2023 - present Computing Society for BYU Idaho Logistics Coordinator

Coordinating industry networking trips to San Francisco.
Managing logistics for company visits and professional networking events.

Oct 2021 - Nov 2023 The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints, Anchorage, AK Full-time Volunteer Representative

Dedicated two years to community service and leadership.
Developed high-level interpersonal communication, resilience, and a strong work ethic in a high-accountability environment.






2024 AI Chatbot for Canvas (MVP) Developed a Python/Flask backend to interface with the Canvas API. Designed an interactive UI using JS/HTML/CSS. Currently implementing natural language processing features.
2024 Database Design & Querying Advanced implementation of MySQL databases, focusing on data integrity, complex subqueries, and efficient schema design.




Dec 2023 - present Costa Vida, Ammon, ID Customer Service & Team Member

Streamlined order processing in a high-volume environment.
Balanced multiple technical and service tasks simultaneously to ensure operational efficiency.

June 2019 - Oct 2021 Service & Labor Roles, Idaho Broulim’s Fresh Foods / Taylor Sons, Inc

Developed foundational professional habits: mentoring new team members, maintaining quality control, and resolving complex customer inquiries.
